form.formComment: Found some support last start but struggled and finished 6th over 366m at this track beaten 3.5 lengths (19.92) behind Highway Princess in a Grade 5 on April 5. Placed two back at this track. Key chance on best form.

form.formComment: Has hit the frame the last couple. Finished third at this track latest but prior to that recorded a strong 19.87 over 366m finishing second at this track. Hard to top on the time from two back.
